name: Hidden Lakes Golf Club
address: 35 Fairgreen Ave, New Smyrna Beach, FL 32168
about: Hidden Lakes Golf Club offers a state-of-the-art golf simulator experience alongside its traditional course facilities. The venue features a golf simulator that provides an immersive indoor experience for players of all skill levels, allowing them to play on world-famous courses regardless of weather conditions. The club is known for its friendly and knowledgeable staff, well-conditioned facilities, and a welcoming atmosphere suitable for both serious golfers and casual players. The 19th Hole Restaurant complements the golf experience with a menu of comfort food and drinks, making it a versatile destination for both sport and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulator for indoor play in any weather
Ability to play on some of the world's most famous courses
Combo experience with food and drinks from the 19th Hole Restaurant
Real-time data and fun challenges for skill improvement
Welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: 19th Hole Restaurant offers comfort food including burgers, wings, fresh salads, and hearty sides.
Craft beers, classic cocktails, and chilled wine available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content doesn't specify whether clubs are provided or if players need to bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a 19th Hole Restaurant that offers food and drinks, but it doesn't specify if outside food is allowed.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The content doesn't provide specific timing information for 18-hole simulator sessions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Hidden Lakes offers junior golf programs and kids play free or at half price depending on the season, indicating a family-friendly environment.
